name: LLM Prompt Logger
description: Log every LLM API call's prompt, messages, and metadata to files.

enableLlmInput.description: Enable logging of llm_input events (request data before LLM call)

enableLlmOutput.description: Enable logging of llm_output events (combined input+output after LLM call)

enableAgentEnd.description: Enable logging of agent_end events (full message snapshot after turn)
